name: Black & White Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread marshmallow creme or scatter marshmallows over the bottom of prepared crust; set aside.
2. In a blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk; let stand 2 minutes.
3. Add hot milk to the blender and process at low speed until gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
4. Add cream cheese, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla (if using) to the blender; process at high speed until blended.
5. Gently pour the mixture into the prepared crust and chill until firm, about 2 hours.
